# Router-name: bilibili_vsearch  
**Commit time:** 2026.07.19  
**Cookies?:** yes (bilibili.com)  
**Author:** AI转写 / huinyg审核 - 来源于RSShub@pcrtool & DIYgod  
**Introduction:** bilibili 视频搜索  
**Address:** rssust://bilibili_vsearch  
**Example:** [rssust://bilibili_vsearch?kw=linux](/bilibili_vsearch?kw=linux)  
**Parameter:**  
1. **kw**  
   Type of parameter: string  
   Default value: null  
   Meaning: 检索关键字  
2. **order**  
   Type of parameter: string  
   Default value: pubdate  
   Meaning: 排序，综合:totalrank 最多点击:click 最新发布:pubdate 最多弹幕:dm 最多收藏:stow  
3. **disableembed**  
   Type of parameter: bool  
   Default value: true  
   Meaning: 内嵌视频  
4. **tid**  
   Type of parameter: number  
   Default value: 0  
   Meaning: 分区 id
